sourceMovie.title: Materialists
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Materialists works as a romance movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Materialists clicked for you, Manhattan (1979) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Materialists?
faq.answer: Try Manhattan, Before We Go, It Ends with Us—each shares DNA with Materialists while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Materialists?
faq.answer: Materialists (2025) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Materialists worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
